strict_goal.statement: Turn current scattered DNN extraction outputs into one standardized large-scale structure corpus with explicit evidence tiers and extraction mass accounting.
strict_goal.boundary: This block proves systematic large-scale extraction bookkeeping and evidence normalization. It does not yet prove dense exact neuron-level extraction.

real_codebook_sparse.notes: 真实 codebook 提取，支持 specific/family/shared 与早中晚区域摘要。

multimodel_real_atlas.notes: 融合 codebook 与 qwen/deepseek 机制条目。

dense_real_unit_corpus.notes: qwen/deepseek layer rows、recovery rows、task rows 与 codebook spotlight 的标准化真实单位。

unified_parametric_atlas.notes: 统一参数 atlas，但仍混合 exemplar 与 synthetic scale-up。

large_scale_inventory_mass.notes: 大规模 concept-only 与 relation-context inventory 规模信号。

relation_attribute_atlas.notes: 属性轴、关系模板、atlas layers 的结构化对象。

strict_verdict.core_answer: The DNN-side extraction route is no longer fragmented. It is now counted as one standardized corpus spanning real sparse entries, multimodel real summaries, large inventory signals, and structured theory objects.
main_hard_gaps: exact real units have grown sharply, but the corpus is still dominated by row-level and proxy-level units rather than dense exact activations
inventory mass is still partly aggregate signal rather than neuron-by-neuron exact evidence
macro successor/protocol fields are richer now, but they still are not dense exact coordinates

next_large_blocks: Replace more aggregate inventory units with dense real activation-level units.
Expand exact real extraction beyond the current 48-unit base.
Bind protocol and successor coordinates into the same standardized corpus at dense level.
